text: I feel a strange sense of possibility and curiosity in this setting. The idea that something—AR, collaboration, or collective knowledge—could respond to my needs is empowering but also unsettling. Surrounded by the blend of people, technology, and discussion, I feel both part of an emerging collective and a solitary observer. There is energy and confusion; a blur between what is being created and how I am supposed to relate to it. The words, the displays, and the rhythm of the scene invite me to question what it means to participate, to collaborate, and whether meaning is really something I can access in the moment, or only piece together after.
